testcase.name: test_articles_public_endpoint_accessible
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter33_features.py:205: in test_articles_public_endpoint_accessible assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 403: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
